Alexandria Franka Maria van Eekelen

'LEXIE'

Interactive Narrative Designer

Alexandria Franka Maria is...

An Utrecht-based game and interactive narrative designer, with her roots in D&D homebrew.

A Creative Media and Game Technologies graduate.

A master's student at PZI, pursuing a thesis on play as artistic development.

Interested in interactivity as a means to broach critical and educational topics.

Glad to receive a message about whatever!

GAMES ★ BSKY ★ LINKEDIN ★ BANDCAMP
